description: Chinese AI-writing tells. The fingerprint of AI-drafted or machine-translated Chinese is 公文腔 (officialese): 进行+noun verb-padding, 予以, and stock ministry phrases where plain Mandarin is direct. Edit this list to fit your house style.

rules.match: 进行(审核|处理|确认|登记|核实|审查|办理|缴纳|核对)
rules.hint: 公文腔 verb-padding (进行+noun). Use the verb directly: 审核, 处理.
Officialese. Use an active verb: 会退回, 会处理.

rules.match: 众所周知|值得一提的是|不可否认
rules.hint: Empty officialese opener. Delete it and start the sentence.
If front-loaded, move the subject forward instead.

rules.match: 相关(部门|材料|规定|人员|文件|信息)
rules.hint: Vague 公文腔 (相关+noun). Name the specific thing.
